name: chart-line-dots
visual_summary: A chart-line-dots component displays line-based data with distinct dots at each data point, often used to visualize trends and patterns over time. This is ideal for developers who want to present complex data in an easy-to-understand format. It is commonly used in reporting dashboards and statistical analysis pages.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-line-dots
Description: A chart-line-dots component displays line-based data with distinct dots at each data point, often used to visualize trends and patterns over time. This is ideal for developers who want to present complex data in an easy-to-understand format. It is commonly used in reporting dashboards and statistical analysis pages.
Style: modern, bright, chart-focused
Interactions: 
Tags: data visualization, line chart, dotted lines

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
